Class Tile

java.lang.Object
it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.model.Board.Tile
Direct Known Subclasses:
DefaultTile, OfferTile
public abstract class Tile extends Object
Abstract base class representing a board tile that can hold a single player.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    Tile(Player playerOn)
    Creates a tile with the given initial occupant (may be null).

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Player
    getPlayerOn()
    Returns the player currently on this tile.
    boolean
    isOccupied()
    Returns whether the tile is currently occupied.
    void
    placePlayer(Player player)
    Places a player on this tile.
    void
    removePlayer()
    Removes the current occupant from this tile.

    Methods inherited from class Object

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

  • Constructor Details

    • Tile

      public Tile(Player playerOn)
      Creates a tile with the given initial occupant (may be null).
      Parameters:
      playerOn - the player initially on this tile, or null if empty

  • Method Details

    • getPlayerOn

      public Player getPlayerOn()
      Returns the player currently on this tile.
      Returns:
      the occupying player, or null if the tile is empty

    • isOccupied

      public boolean isOccupied()
      Returns whether the tile is currently occupied.
      Returns:
      true if a player is on the tile

    • placePlayer

      public void placePlayer(Player player)
      Places a player on this tile.
      Parameters:
      player - the player to place

    • removePlayer

      public void removePlayer()
      Removes the current occupant from this tile.
